DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS PROVISIONALLY GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT ALL CASES ARISE FROM THIS INCIDENT ARE ON FILE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL DISCOVERY IS STAYED THROUGH AND INCLUDING 6/29/10. MOVING PARTY TO GIVE NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-29-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF CASE TO A SINGLE JUDGE HELD. THE COURT SINGLY ASSIGNED ALL PRE-TRIAL MATTERS IN THIS CASE TO DEPT. 206. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 9/22/10 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED DISCOVERY STAYS LIFTED AS OF 6/29/10 AS TO ANY PENDING DISCOVERY. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER TO THE COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E.
